spec.name: WorldCollapse
spec.summary: A reality-altering effect that releases soul energy in a field volume by changing existing conditions
spec.effect_description: Invokes a fundamental disruption to local Flux architecture. The caster inscribes a sigil that releases soul energy in a field volume by changing existing conditions. Effect range: long. Persistence: permanent. Side effects on caster and casting site are documented but not fully understood.
spec.notes: Pale-class spell - use with extreme caution

all_grimoire_row: | **WorldCollapse** | Circle | Emit | Affect | T6 | Soul | Raw | Field | Long | Permanent | Filter |
